rounds.attribution: Photo by Andrea Huls Pareja on Unsplash
rounds.pro_tip: CATEGORY: AUTHENTIC CONTEXT. Observe the specific location "Venice, Florida" and the natural, less detailed description of activities. Real photos provide genuine, simple contextual clues.

rounds.attribution: Photo by Jeffrey Eisen on Pexels
rounds.pro_tip: CATEGORY: GENERIC CAPTIONS. "Group of people on beach" offers no specific details beyond the main subjects. Real photos often have broad, summary-like labels.
CATEGORY: HYPER-DETAIL. Notice the emphasized "fine grains of sand on their knees" and "faint shimmer of sunscreen." This microscopic precision is a common AI tell.
rounds._note: Prompt: A photorealistic photograph of a small group of friends laughing as they walk along the waterline, one carrying a boogie board, with the vast expanse of a clean beach behind them. Captured with a Nikon D850 and a 35mm f/1.8 lens during golden hour, focusing on the individual footprints etched into the damp sand and the loose weave of a striped beach blanket being carried.

rounds.pro_tip: Here are your pro tips for the Summer's Start AI detection game:
rounds._note: Prompt: A photorealistic photograph of two young girls, one with a bright red bucket, building a sandcastle at the ocean's edge, while the other watches intently, occasionally glancing towards the camera. Taken with a Canon 5D Mark IV and an 85mm f/1.4 lens under bright mid-morning sun, emphasizing the fine grains of sand on their knees and the faint shimmer of sunscreen on their skin.

rounds.attribution: Photo by Louis Hansel on Unsplash
rounds.pro_tip: CATEGORY: NATURAL SIMPLICITY. Descriptions like "a young girl sitting on a beach next to another young girl" are straightforward and unembellished. Look for concise, general scene descriptions.
CATEGORY: TEXTURAL PERFECTION. Look for "crisp shadows cast by the umbrella poles" and "delicate weave patterns of various beach towels." AI often renders textures with immaculate clarity.
rounds._note: Prompt: A photorealistic photograph of two friends peacefully lounging on large beach towels, one reading a paperback novel with a creased cover, the other with eyes closed and an arm casually draped over their face. Taken with a Fujifilm X-T4 and a 56mm f/1.2 lens on a softly overcast day, noticing the individual grains of sand clinging to their damp towels and the subtle wrinkles on the sun-warmed skin of their arms.

rounds.attribution: Photo by April Walker on Unsplash
rounds.pro_tip: CATEGORY: ARTIFICIAL VIBRANCY. Seek "individual water droplets suspended in the air" and "slight sheen of salt on their sun-kissed skin." AI often creates unnaturally perfect, glistening elements.
CATEGORY: RELATABLE SCENES. "A couple of people laying on top of a beach" describes a common, un-staged moment. Real photos often capture everyday, less perfect compositions.
CATEGORY: UNCANNY PRECISION. Observe the exact "individual footprints etched into the damp sand" and the "loose weave of a striped beach blanket." AI thrives on such perfect renderings.
rounds._note: Prompt: A photorealistic photograph of a bustling beach scene filled with diverse families and individuals relaxing under an array of brightly colored umbrellas and pop-up tents. Shot with a Sony Alpha 7 III and a 70-200mm f/4 lens at 70mm under the intense mid-day sun, highlighting the crisp shadows cast by the umbrella poles and the delicate weave patterns of various beach towels spread on the sand.

rounds.pro_tip: CATEGORY: SURREAL CLARITY. Identify "individual grains of sand clinging to their damp towels" and "subtle wrinkles on sun-warmed skin." AI excels at consistent, pinpoint focus on minutiae.
rounds._note: Prompt: A photorealistic photograph of a joyous group of friends splashing and swimming in the clear, shallow ocean water, with some laughter lines visible on their faces as they interact. Captured with a Canon EOS R6 and a 24-70mm f/2.8 lens at 50mm under sparkling, direct afternoon sun, emphasizing the individual water droplets suspended in the air and the slight sheen of salt on their sun-kissed skin.

category_subtitle: AI's trying to sneak into your summer. Catch the imposter!
